title: Sales promoter (Mustafa Centre)
description:
We are looking for a dedicated sales promoter to join our business development team.
The sales promoter's responsibilities include attracting new customers and improving profits, assist with improving knowledge of the product range, answering questions, and addressing customer concerns.

You should be able to multitask and deliver excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment.

Responsibilities

1.      Listening and understanding customers’ needs, assist them to find the perfect product for their needs.

2.      Constantly building product knowledge and delivering this knowledge in engaging ways.

3.      Setting up attractive product displays and promotional booths.

4.      Delivering presentations and demonstrations to customers and other stakeholders.

5.      Engaging in meaningful interactions and building good relationships with customers.

6.      Distributing samples and providing feedback for improvement to the management team.

7.      Following up with customers and providing guidance on product selection.

8.      Meeting daily targets and submitting sales reports.

9.      Networking with relevant stakeholders.

10.   Searching for new business opportunities.

Requirements

• Experience in retail recommended, open to retail working hours from noon onwards.

• Sharp customer service skills, eloquent and comfortable when delivering presentations.

• Ability to work independently.

• Good to have if you speak tamil.

postedCompany.description:
Borden Company (Private) Limited is a consumer healthcare manufacturing company based in Singapore. Globally, Borden Company (Private) Limited is best known for producing the popular Eagle Brand Medicated Oil which has become synonymously known as the “Green Oil”.  


As such Eagle Brand is a well-known and trusted Singaporean consumer healthcare and pharmaceutical brand, with over 100 years of history. The Eagle Brand’s signature product is its Green Medicated Oil, also known as the “Green Oil”, which is a popular household product in Singapore and many parts of the world.  


Eagle Brand Medicated Oil remains the company’s core product, selling more than 100 million bottles since the company’s inception. Through dedicated research and development, the company now offers an extended range of consumer healthcare products, including the Muscular Balm, Green Balm, Yellow Balm, Muscle Rub, Capsicum Plaster, Eucalyptus Disinfected Spray, Inhaler and Eucalyptus Oils range. More recent innovation includes the development and distribution of a Tea Tree Disinfectant Spray, Eucalyptus Handwash and Aloe Mint Disinfectant Liquid to help fight the COVID-19 pandemic.
postedCompany.name: BORDEN COMPANY (PRIVATE) LIMITED
